Working tree mostly clean — one stray staged DELETE for .planning/v2.3-MILESTONE-AUDIT.md (audit was moved to milestones/ in commit 3981782f but the prior-session-state deletion never got staged with the move — staged here at pause time). The bash heredoc failure didn't write anything to ROADMAP.md so the file is still in the same shape it was committed at 24b0f0a3. Pause budget context was at 65% used / 35% remaining when bash heredoc EOF error fired; reasonable to pause and resume in a fresh session.
